martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, happy anniversary! You and Britt have a great day for a run, especially between 6 and 8 am when it's a cool 16°C with hardly any wind. The rest of the day isn't so bad either, but it's definitely a morning for lacing up - maybe drag Britt along for a romantic morning jog.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, happy anniversary! Running looks great today, especially early on from 06:00–08:00 when it's a cool 16°C. Maybe drag Martha along for a 06:00 run and then surprise her with a relaxed morning on the terrace? The rest of the day isn't as ideal with moderate gusts, so make the most of the calm morning.
